gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (428/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (428/ 9)

parts.text: الْعَبَّاسِ بْنِ هِلَالٍ الشَّامِيِّ مَوْلًى لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ مُوسَى ( عليه السلام )

text: سَمِعْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) يَقُولُ كُلَّمَا أَحْدَثَ الْعِبَادُ مِنَ الذُّنُوبِ مَا لَمْ يَكُونُوا يَعْمَلُونَ أَحْدَثَ اللَّهُ لَهُمْ مِنَ الْبَلَاءِ مَا لَمْ يَكُونُوا يَعْرِفُونَ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad BinMuhammad Al Kufy, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Al Maysami,

(It has been narrated) from Al-Abbas Bin Hilal Al-Shamy, a slave of Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> who said, ‘I heard Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> saying: ‘Every time the servants innovate a sin what did not happened to be performed beforehand, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Innovates for them, from the afflictions, what they did not happened to be recognising (New type of affliction)’.
en.sarwar: 29. Ahmad ibn Muhammad al-Kufi has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan al- Maythami from al-‘Abbas ibn Hilal al-Shami, Mawla of abu al-Hassan Musa (a.s.) who has said the following: “I heard al-Rida (a.s.) saying, ‘Whenever servants commit such sins that they had not committed before, Allah creates a new misfortune against them of which they had no knowledge.’”
